_about: SYNTHETIC intangible-assets GL with a KNOWN roll-forward answer (NOT real data). Proves the GENERIC movement builder (Slice N1) on a SECOND single-leaf note via the telecom seed's tc_intangibles concept. Three classes: Software and Licences (cost + accumulated AMORTIZATION — the contra is amortization, not depreciation), and Goodwill (cost only — the indefinite-life exemption, the Land analog). Each schedule ties (opening + movements = closing). Total NBV 5800 == the master concept's value, so the note attaches and reconciles, captioned 'Intangible assets'. Failing cases (BLOCKED total, internal-tie break, amortization-sign-flip) are applied test-side by perturbation, like the PP&E fixture. Real-Mobily-Note-8 verification is the named pending gate.
